name: akbun-draw-architecture
description: Architecture drawing skills by akbun — AWS/Kubernetes draw.io diagrams and architecture/network flow figure prompts

interface.shortDescription: Architecture and network diagram drawing skills
interface.longDescription: Architecture drawing skills — draw.io AWS VPC and Kubernetes network diagrams, plus image-generation prompts for high-level component architecture and network traffic flow figures.
defaultPrompt: Create a draw.io AWS VPC architecture diagram
Draw a Kubernetes network diagram with draw.io
Draw a high-level component architecture diagram of this code
Make an image prompt showing how traffic flows between these components
